decisions.title: Pipeline gap $1.6M at risk for Q2 target
decisions.summary: Current pipeline coverage is 2.1× but 32% of deals are stuck. Q2 target of $4.2M requires $5.8M in pipeline — $1.6M gap exists.

decisions.title: AE hiring gate blocked — runway below 18mo
decisions.summary: Runway at 17.4 months. CFO hiring gate requires 18mo minimum. 3 AE hires on hold until runway threshold met or bridge funding secured.

decisions.title: Churn rate improved — NRR trending up
decisions.summary: Monthly churn dropped from 3.8% to 1.7%. NRR improved to 108%. Health score intervention playbook is working — 3 at-risk accounts saved.

decisions.title: Enterprise deal ACME blocked on SOC2
decisions.summary: ACME Corp ($180K ARR) requires SOC2 Type II certification before signing. Security audit scheduled for April 15. Decision: accelerate or lose deal.

decisions.title: Feature X usage below 10% — kill decision needed
decisions.summary: Feature X has 7% adoption after 6 months. Engineering cost: $50K/quarter. Recommendation: sunset and reallocate resources to mobile app.
